name: wog-kaiserbaeder.de
message: Wohnungsgesellschaft Kaiserbder Gemeinde Ostseebad Heringsdorf Verwaltungs - GmbH is a company that operates in the Fitness & Dance Facilities industry. It employs 50to99 people and has 10Mto25M of revenue. The company is headquartered in Heringsdorf, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany.
